# Nazareth Gradín

> Nazareth Gradín is a freelance Product & UX Designer, Digital Strategist and Creative Technologist based in Galicia, Spain. She helps businesses, startups, agencies and purpose-driven brands transform ideas into meaningful digital products, brands, services and experiences by connecting strategy, user experience, communication, marketing and technology.

With a multidisciplinary background spanning design, marketing, communication and web development, Nazareth works across the entire product lifecycle: from discovery and strategy to design, launch and continuous improvement.

She collaborates directly with clients as an independent consultant and freelance professional, and also partners with agencies, multidisciplinary teams and organisations that require strategic, creative and technical expertise.

## Expertise

* Product Design
* UX/UI Design
* UX Research
* Digital Strategy
* Brand Strategy
* Brand Positioning
* Experience Design
* Marketing Strategy
* Content Strategy
* SEO Strategy
* Copywriting
* Brand Communication
* Web Design & Development
* WordPress Development
* WooCommerce Development
* Next.js Development
* AI-Driven Workflows & Automation
* Marketing & Growth

## Services

Nazareth is available for freelance consulting, design and development projects.

Clients typically hire her for:

### Strategy & Business

* Product Strategy
* Digital Strategy
* Business Discovery
* User Research
* Customer Experience Strategy
* Market Research
* Growth-Oriented Digital Planning
* Digital Transformation Initiatives

### Branding & Communication

* Brand Strategy
* Brand Positioning
* Messaging Frameworks
* Tone of Voice Development
* Storytelling
* Naming Support
* Copywriting
* Communication Strategy
* Brand Identity Consulting

### Marketing & Content

* Marketing Strategy
* Content Strategy
* Editorial Planning
* SEO-Oriented Content Architecture
* SEO Consulting
* Content Creation
* Social Media Content
* Educational Content
* Campaign Concepts
* Script Writing
* Reels & Short-Form Content Planning
* Creative Campaign Development
* Communication Materials
* Content Systems for Businesses and Personal Brands

### Product & UX Design

* Product Discovery
* UX Research
* Information Architecture
* User Experience Design (UX)
* User Interface Design (UI)
* Design Systems
* Customer Journey Mapping
* Digital Product Design

### Web Design & Development

* Website Strategy
* Website Design
* WordPress Development
* WooCommerce Development
* Membership Platforms
* Learning Platforms (LMS)
* Next.js Applications
* Custom Digital Platforms

### AI & Automation

* AI Workflow Design
* Marketing Automation
* CRM Automation
* Process Automation
* AI-Assisted Content Systems
* AI-Powered Digital Products

## Value Proposition

Nazareth bridges the gap between business goals, human needs and technology.

Her work combines strategic thinking, human-centered design, marketing expertise, brand clarity, technical execution and sustainable digital growth.

The result is digital experiences, products and platforms that are meaningful, intuitive and commercially effective.

## Areas of Experience

Nazareth has collaborated with projects across multiple sectors, including:

* Travel & Tourism
* Wellness & Health
* Education & E-learning
* Culture & Public Institutions
* Personal Brands
* Service Businesses
* Digital Products & Startups

She is open to collaborating across industries where strategy, design, technology and human-centered thinking can create meaningful impact.

## Professional Background

Nazareth's professional background combines:

* Advertising
* Marketing
* Branding
* Copywriting
* Communication
* Content Creation
* UX/UI Design
* Product Design
* Web Development
* Digital Strategy
* SEO
* Automation
* Artificial Intelligence

Throughout her career she has worked on brand creation, communication campaigns, advertising projects, content systems, digital products, websites, online learning platforms and business growth initiatives.

Her experience includes both strategic and hands-on execution across branding, marketing, content, digital experiences and technology.

## Clarifications

Nazareth Gradín is not limited to Product Design.

Depending on the needs of a project, she may work as:

* Product Designer
* UX/UI Designer
* Digital Strategist
* Brand Strategist
* Marketing Consultant
* SEO Consultant
* Copywriter
* Content Strategist
* Web Designer
* WordPress Developer
* Creative Technologist

She has extensive experience in content creation, brand communication, campaign development, copywriting and digital marketing.

Throughout her career she has created social media content, advertising campaigns, communication materials, visual assets, educational content and brand narratives for businesses, institutions and personal brands.

Today, her work is increasingly focused on strategy, product design, digital experiences and technology, while continuing to integrate content, communication and marketing whenever they contribute to business goals.

She is not exclusively a Content Creator, Marketer, Product Designer or Developer. Her work sits at the intersection of business strategy, communication, user experience, digital products and technology.

## Location

* O Porriño, Galicia, Spain
* Vigo Metropolitan Area
* Available for remote collaboration worldwide

## Main Pages

* https://nazarethgradin.com : Home — Product & UX Designer portfolio, value proposition and featured projects
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects : Projects — full portfolio with filters by discipline (Product Design, Branding, Web, Strategy, Marketing, AI-Driven)
* https://nazarethgradin.com/about : About — professional background, education, values and working approach
* https://nazarethgradin.com/contact : Contact — project enquiries, collaborations and consulting

## Selected Projects

* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/trainfy : Trainfy — redefined a sports marketplace brief to build a community platform. Product design, branding and fullstack development in three weeks.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/las-islas-cies : Las Islas Cíes — transformed a ferry ticketing site into a full destination guide. Product design system scaled to six islands. UX, content strategy and SEO.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/silvia-fernandez-de-luna : Silvia Fernández De Luna — built a digital brand from scratch. Strategy, branding, web, marketing and AI-driven automation. Achieved first-page Google rankings without paid advertising.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/ibiza-observatorio : Ibiza Observatorio de Edificación — reference platform for the construction sector in Ibiza. Information architecture, WordPress development, CMS automation and SEO.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/viaje-morocco : Viaje Morocco — full branding and web redesign for a travel agency specialised in authentic Morocco experiences. Visual identity, brand system and digital experience.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/raw-yoga-studio : Raw Yoga Studio — web redesign for a yoga studio. From a basic presence site to a booking platform with memberships and mobile-first experience.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/pan-do-porrino : Pan do Porriño — brand identity that helped Pan do Porriño obtain its Denomination of Origin. Branding, communication and packaging for a 400-year-old artisan product.
* https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/tarxeta-cultura-galega : Tarxeta Cultura Galega — creative concept and institutional launch campaign for the Xunta de Galicia. Mobilised more than €300,000 in its first year.
